title: Spicy Slovenian Potato Stir-fry
description: This tangy, tender dish features a blend of spices including chilli powder for an indulgent Slovakian flavor profile, perfect for a satisfying lunch or dinner.

ingredients.name: potatoes
ingredients.notes: preferably with skin for added nutrition

instructions: Preheat oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Slice the potatoes into thin rounds and add them to the hot oil. Cook until golden brown, about 5 minutes.
Remove potatoes from oil and set aside on paper towels. Add onions and garlic to the same pan and sauté for another minute.
Add chopped potatoes back into the pan along with the spices and salt/pepper. Stir well.
Pour in sour cream (if using) and stir again until evenly distributed, about 2 minutes more.
Serve hot as a side dish or main course.
